summary: Fox Business 'Mornings with Maria' interview clip of DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin discussing the end of the government shutdown and using the word 'kamikaze' for Democrats. Remote talking-head TV segment with chyrons and stock tickers. No music track.
notable_text: REPUBLICANS WARN OF ANOTHER PRE-MIDTERM SHUTDOWN; TRUMP SIGNS BILL FUNDING DHS, ENDING SHUTDOWN; MARKWAYNE MULLIN U.S. HOMELAND SECURITY SECRETARY
